evidence.claim: Built and shipped ranking models using XGBoost and LightGBM
evidence.source_text: Trained and shipped multiple ranking models for our product's discovery feed using XGBoost and LightGBM.
Implemented a RAG-based customer support chatbot integrated with our existing ticketing system.

evidence.claim: Built document ingestion pipeline using OpenAI embeddings and Pinecone
evidence.source_text: Built the document ingestion pipeline (chunking, embedding via OpenAI embeddings, storing in Pinecone)

evidence.claim: Reduced average ticket resolution time by 31%
evidence.source_text: Deployment cut average ticket resolution time by 31% for the supported categories.

evidence.claim: Collaborated with PMs to define optimization targets
evidence.source_text: Worked closely with PMs to define the optimization target (click-through vs. dwell time vs. downstream conversion) — that work was as important as the modeling itself.

evidence.claim: Learned that retrieval problems are evaluation problems
evidence.source_text: I've learned that most retrieval problems are actually evaluation problems in disguise.

evidence.claim: Gained primary learning from shipping real systems under production load
evidence.source_text: my main learning has come from shipping real systems and seeing what holds up under production load.

evidence.claim: Designed evaluation framework with automatic and human-in-the-loop metrics
evidence.source_text: Designed the evaluation framework with both automatic metrics (BLEU, ROUGE) and human-in-the-loop quality scores.

evidence.claim: Owned offline-online correlation analysis for model metrics
evidence.source_text: Owned the offline-online correlation analysis that determined which offline metrics actually predicted A/B test outcomes.
